global_production_variables.directorial_treatment: Shot on 35mm anamorphic lenses, high-contrast cinematic lighting, rich shadow detail, film grain, steady tracking camera movements

Character_P.description: Adult man, 28, thin wiry frame, medium height, short dark brown hair, thoughtful brown eyes, slightly tired face, usually a red pizza-delivery polo or light blue t-shirt and jeans; in childhood flashbacks about 8 years old, smaller, curious, same family features.

Character_N.description: Older brother, 31, tall muscular build, reddish-brown hair, strong jaw, intense eyes, intimidating but protective presence; often gym clothes, factory workwear, or casual street clothes; in childhood flashbacks about 12, sturdy kid, same reddish-brown hair, defiant stance.

Character_M.description: Elderly mother, mid-60s to 70s, thin frail frame, brown hair going gray, soft lined face, often house clothes or a simple cardigan; increasingly confused distant eyes; moves carefully, sometimes reaches for walls for balance.

Character_S.description: Young woman near 28, calm intelligent presence, light blue ocean eyes, pale skin, short brown hair, soft features, often casual tops (greens/neutrals) or simple dresses; empathetic expression, steady posture.

Kevin McCleary.description: Adult man, mid-40s, solid build, short neat brown hair, practical work clothes, calm supervisory presence, weathered but kind face.

Bob.description: Adult man, late 40s to early 50s, average build, thinning hair, friendly service-worker look, simple polo or work shirt, approachable everyday face.
